businessName: Paranjape Blue Ridge - Sovereign Sales Gallery
address: Blue Ridge Township, Phase 1, Hinjewadi, Rajiv Gandhi Infotech Park
shortDescription: Pune's premier 138-acre integrated township offering premium 2, 3, 4, and 5 BHK luxury apartments in Hinjewadi Phase 1.
longDescription: Experience the absolute pinnacle of integrated living at Paranjape Blue Ridge. Located at the strategic confluence of Hinjewadi Phase 1 and Mahalunge, this 138-acre gated community features a professional 9-hole golf course, a private boat club on the Mula River, and the ICSE-affiliated Blue Ridge Public School inside the township. Perfect ready-to-move and under-construction configurations (including Promenade Residences and Ridges 41) for families seeking the ultimate lifestyle and investors seeking high capital appreciation in the West Pune real estate market.
